channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Stop burning money in 2026: How to find and cancel your unneeded subscriptions easily
item.description: The new year often brings sticker shock. A glance at our bank statements and credit card bills shows just how much we spent during the holidays, serving as a painful reminder that with the festivities behind us, we should work on getting our expenditures under control.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: The 30 most exciting new shows of 2026: TechRadar's top TV picks on Netflix, Prime Video, HBO Max, and more
item.description: There'll be lots of great new TV shows this year – here are our top choices for early 2026, plus some to look out for in the months ahead.
item.dc:creator: Tom Power, TechRadar

item.title: Notion isn't just a note-taking app –here are 5 ways I'm using it to run my life in 2026
item.description: Notion has become an all-in-one app like no other – here’s why it’s worth a look in 2026, plus my favorite new tools.
item.dc:creator: Lloyd Coombes, TechRadar

item.title: NDAA scales back ambitious acquisition reforms, offers little on workforce
item.description: "Without a workforce initiative, it is hard to see the workforce having the tools to take the risks the legislation wants them to take,” Stan Soloway said. The post NDAA scales back ambitious acquisition reforms, offers little on workforce first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Obis, Federal News Network

item.title: How to watch NHL Winter Classic 2026: live stream New York Rangers vs Florida Panthers, TV channels, preview
item.description: Here's how to watch Rangers vs Panthers live streams online in the 2026 NHL Winter Classic, as the traditional New Year's game heads to Florida for the first time.
item.dc:creator: Adam Marshall, TechRadar

item.title: AI’s most important benchmark in 2026? Trust
item.description: In 2026 (and beyond) the best benchmark for large language models won’t be MMLU or AgentBench or GAIA. It will be trust—something AI will have to rebuild before it can be broadly useful and valuable to both consumers and businesses. Researchers identify several different kinds of AI trust.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: There's still no sign of the Nvidia RTX 5080 32GB despite rumors – and a fresh claim suggests a worrying possibility
item.description: Fresh rumors suggest Nvidia RTX 5080 32GB was initially set for cloud gaming only, and that's a worrying sign for any potential launch.
item.dc:creator: Isaiah Williams, TechRadar

item.title: US cybersecurity experts plead guilty to attacking US companies with ransomware
item.description: Two cybersecurity professionals charged with running a ransomware operation have pleaded guilty to conspiring to obstruct, delay, or affect commerce through extortion. They will be sentenced on March 12, 2026, the US Department of Justice announced this week.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: What is cloud computing? From infrastructure to autonomous, agentic-driven ecosystems
item.description: Cloud computing continues to be the platform of choice for large applications and a driver of innovation in enterprise technology. Gartner forecasts public cloud spending alone to the public cloud services market alone will reach $1.42 trillion in current U.S.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: From DOJ to VA, Kshemendra Paul’s journey exemplifies lasting public service
item.description: "It's so important not to get caught up and react to the moment, but to be reflective, smart and strategic, and to respond in the moment," Kshemendra Paul said. The post From DOJ to VA, Kshemendra Paul’s journey exemplifies lasting public service first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gerton, Federal News Network

item.title: Nvidia licenses Groq’s inferencing chip tech and hires its leaders
item.description: Nvidia has licensed intellectual property from inferencing chip designer Groq, and hired away some of its senior executives, but stopped short of an outright acquisition.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: OpenAI tightens AI rules for teens but concerns remain
item.description: OpenAI announces new teen safety rules for ChatGPT users under 18, blocking romantic roleplay and requiring extra caution on body image topics.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How to build RAG at scale
item.description: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) has quickly become the enterprise default for grounding generative AI in internal knowledge. It promises less hallucination, more accuracy, and a way to unlock value from decades of documents, policies, tickets, and institutional memory.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Foreign tech workers are avoiding travel to the US
item.description: I go to a lot of tech conferences — 13 in 2025 — and many of those I attend are outside the US; several are in London, one is in Amsterdam, another in Paris, and two in Tokyo.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Humanoid robots are having a moment, but still face an uphill battle
item.description: Robots have long been seen as a bad bet for Silicon Valley investors — too complicated, capital-intensive, and “boring, honestly,” says venture capitalist Modar Alaoui.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: SoftBank expands AI infrastructure ambitions with $4B DigitalBridge acquisition
item.description: SoftBank Group has announced plans to acquire DigitalBridge Group, an asset manager specializing in digital infrastructure investments such as data centers, cell towers, and fiber networks, in a deal valued at $4 billion.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: More than $32 billion in U.S. clean energy projects were canceled in 2025
item.description: Two years ago, a $575 million battery factory planned in St. Louis, Missouri, was set to be the first large-scale lithium iron phosphate (LFP) facility in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Adele Peters, Fast Company

item.title: 700Credit data breach exposes SSNs of 5.8M consumers
item.description: A 2025 data breach at fintech company 700Credit exposes personal information of more than 5.8 million people through compromised third-party integration partner.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: AI takes on return fraud as holiday returns surge
item.description: Retailers lose $76.5 billion annually to return fraud as nearly 10% of U.S. retail returns involve fraudulent activity, with $850 billion in returns expected in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pornhub hit by massive user data leak exposing 200 million records
item.description: ShinyHunters claims responsibility for stealing 94GB of Pornhub user data affecting over 200 million records and demands Bitcoin ransom.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 5 Best apps to use on ChatGPT right now
item.description: ChatGPT 2025 now connects to Apple Music, Canva, Expedia, TripAdvisor and OpenTable through built-in apps that help users create playlists, design graphics and more.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
